title: Half Heart Hardcore (HHH)
description: All it does is set the player's max health to half a heart. It works on any player that joins the game later. Optimized to the max
body:
Ideal for a hardcore world, **sets all players' max health to half a heart**.

**Works with players who join the game later.**

**Optimized** to the max


![In Game View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/831e2297fbd69016976b3424464ca4be1248ea19_0.webp)

Any questions or proposals, you can send an email to 00pdj00@gmail.com.
